title: rexec, remote process execution. Used by mail system to notify users of new mail received.
Rlogin. Maintains data bases for who's logged on a local net and the average load of the machine.
Syslog. cmd like exec but automatic authentication is performed for login server.
Like tenex link but across machine - doesn't use link protocol. A rendezvous port establishes a tcp connection.
RIP, Routing Information Protocol. Extended file name server.
ESMTP, Extended Simple Mail Transfer Protocol.
